title: Processing of Pacbio Iso-seq Sequences
author: Bing Cheng; Agnelo Furtado; Robert Henry
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ja3cign

steps.title: To remove the Primer IIA sequence...
steps.instruction: To remove the Primer IIA sequence motifs used in library preparations.

steps.title: LQ output or non-full length coverage...
steps.instruction: LQ output or non-full length coverage sequences may from rare transcripts or lower coverage sequences. HQ: high quality sequences, LQ, low quality sequences generated from RS IsoSeq pipeline

steps.title: To further remove the redundant sequences
steps.instruction: To further remove the redundant sequences. The output dataset was hereafter called dataset A

steps.title: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset A against the complete C
steps.instruction: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset A against the complete C.arabica chloroplast genome. Accession number: EF044213.1 (processed with CLC genomic workbench)

steps.title: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset B against the N
steps.instruction: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset B against the N.tabacum and V. vinifera complete mitochondrial genomes (relate species) Accession number: BA000042.1 and FM179380.1 (processed with CLC genomic workbench)

steps.title: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset C against...
steps.instruction: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset C against the public available ribosomal genes from C. arabica, C.canephora and C.eugenioides Accession number: AJ224846, EU650386, DQ153609, AF416459, EU650384, EU650385, AF542981, AF542990, JX459583, JX459584, JX459585, JX459586, JX459587, DQ153593, AF542982, DQ423064, DQ153588, DQ153621, AF542986 (processed with CLC genomic workbench)

steps.title: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset D against...
steps.instruction: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset D against the reference genomes of virus and viroid Download from NCBI (processed with CLC genomic workbench)

steps.title: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset E against...
steps.instruction: BLASTn (1e-10) the dataset E against the reference genome of prokaryotes Download from NCBI (processed with CLC genomic workbench)

steps.title: BLASTx (1e-10) the dataset F against...
steps.instruction: BLASTx (1e-10) the dataset F against the fungal proteins Download from NCBI (processed with CLC genomic workbench)

steps.title: Significant matches are filtered with bit...
steps.instruction: Significant matches are filtered with bit score (X) ≥ 300 and identity ≥ 80% Processed with CLC genomic workbench

steps.title: All the significant matches were confirmed...
steps.instruction: All the significant matches were confirmed with cloud BLASTn (bit score (Y)) Processed with CLC genomic workbench

steps.title: If X > Y, then the sequences should be removed
steps.instruction: If X > Y, then the sequences should be removed. This is done subsequently after each detecting steps, therefore, the dataset number is decreased and its name has changed from step 4 onwards. Processed with CLC genomic workbench

steps.title: Sequence quality was then accessed with...
steps.instruction: Sequence quality was then accessed with the Fasta Statistics through Galaxy/GVL 4.0 Hereafter the dataset was called dataset G
